title: Permissions
description: Control what this plugin can access
locationDesc: Access the hub's physical location (address, coordinates, timezone)
secretsDesc: Read and write per-plugin credentials in the OS keychain
netDesc: Make outbound HTTP requests to the listed hosts
fsDesc: Read or write files inside the plugin's virtual storage roots
wsDesc: Open persistent WebSocket connections to the listed hosts
dnsDesc: Resolve hostnames through the hub's DNS proxy
uiDesc: Open native file-picker dialogs on behalf of the user
